entity.summary: Decentralized exchange in the BEVM Bitcoin Layer 2 ecosystem. BEVMSwap uses automated-market-maker and concentrated-liquidity designs and presents itself as infrastructure for BTC-ecosystem DeFi trading and liquidity. Its official documentation and exchange profile remain available.
entity.notes: Launch is stored at year precision because exchange directories identify BEVMSwap as established in 2024 but a reliable exact first-party launch day was not recovered. The record is scoped to the DEX and is distinct from the underlying BEVM Layer 2 network.

events.title: BEVMSwap began operating in the BEVM ecosystem
events.description: BEVMSwap was established in 2024 as a decentralized exchange for the BEVM Bitcoin Layer 2 ecosystem.
events.notes: Year-level marker from the current exchange profile; no exact first-party launch day was recovered.

evidence.title: BEVMSwap exchange profile
evidence.notes: Current exchange profile identifies BEVMSwap as a decentralized exchange established in 2024 and links the bevmswap.xyz domain.

evidence.title: BEVMSwap introduction
evidence.notes: Official documentation describes BEVMSwap's AMM, concentrated-liquidity, yield-token, and governance model for BTC-ecosystem DeFi users.

evidence.title: BEVMSwap official application
evidence.notes: Official application domain used as current operating-status evidence.

evidence.title: BEVM mainnet launch and ecosystem context
evidence.notes: Ecosystem source documenting the BEVM Bitcoin Layer 2 context in which BEVMSwap operates.
